india_trends.title: Alpha Corp to invest Rs 900 cr to complete stalled projects in Delhi-NCR; relief for 3k customers
india_trends.summary: Realty firm Alpha Corp Development Ltd will invest nearly Rs 900 crore to complete three stalled housing and commercial projects in Greater Noida and Gurugram, a development that would provide relief to more than 3,000 existing customers.

india_trends.summary: Five BSE 100 LargeMidcap TMC stocks, including Adani Green, Polycab and Nestle India, hit fresh 52-week highs despite broader market softness, rallying up to 48% in a month.

india_trends.title: CAG conducting special audit of 101 cities to assess ease of living, says Murthy
india_trends.summary: India is auditing 101 cities to understand citizen ease of living. The Comptroller and Auditor General is also examining transport and logistics. india_trends.title: Everstone Capital acquires Germany’s Qlar Group in $150-200 million deal
india_trends.summary: The acquisition underscores Singapore-based Everstone’s push to back global manufacturing and engineering businesses with significant operations in India and Asia.

india_trends.title: Dabur India Q4 Results: Profit beats estimates, rises 16% YoY to ₹362 crore, declares final dividend of ₹5.5
india_trends.summary: Dabur India reported a 16% growth in consolidated net profit for Q4 FY26, reaching ₹362 crore, surpassing market expectations. Domestic demand remained strong despite challenges in its international business due to the West Asia crisis.

india_trends.title: Axis Bank raises $500 million in offshore loan from MUFG
india_trends.summary: Axis Bank, India's third-largest private lender, has secured a $500 million offshore loan from Mitsubishi UFJ Financial Group. This three-year facility will support the bank's lending and general business needs. The loan comes as Indian banks face challenges with loan growth outpacing deposit growth

india_trends.title: Yanolja acquires InnKey to expand global enterprise hospitality platform
india_trends.summary: Global travel technology firm Yanolja has acquired India's InnKey, an enterprise hospitality platform. This move strengthens Yanolja's global reach in the hotel sector. InnKey's unified system manages hotel operations, including front office and finance. The acquisition aims to enhance guest experie

india_trends.title: Gainers & Losers: Paytm, Godrej Industries among 8 big stock movers on Thursday
india_trends.summary: Indian benchmark indices ended marginally lower amid weakness in FMCG, IT and PSU banking stocks. Paytm surged after reporting quarterly profit, while Godrej Industries, Hero MotoCorp, Tejas Networks and Vedanta gained.

india_trends.title: Beware! Finance Secretary Nagaraju warns banks about risk from Mythos
india_trends.summary: Indian financial authorities are alerting banks to the significant risks from advanced AI models.
